title: Will SK Hynix’s Wall Street debut narrow its 'Korea discount'?
summary_full: As global chip giant SK Hynix makes its Nasdaq debut Friday, the listing serves as a major test of whether the company can shed its long standing "Korea Discount."
summary_public: As global chip giant SK Hynix makes its Nasdaq debut Friday, the listing serves as a major test of whether the company can shed its long standing "Korea Discount."
